title: Le passivo
summary: The passive voice: esser + past participle.

teach.target: Le libro es scribite per illa.
teach.roman: le libro es scribite per illa
teach.english: The book is written by her.
teach.ipa: le lˈibro es skribˈite pˈer ˈila

teach.note: porta = door; aperir = to open, aperite = opened.

grammar.title: The passive voice
grammar.body:
The passive uses **esser** (to be, in any tense) plus the past participle — exactly like English:
**Le libro es scribite.** (The book is written.)
**Le libro esseva scribite in 1950.** (The book was written in 1950.)
Use **per** for the agent ("by"): **scribite per illa** (written by her).

teach.target: Iste pan es facite in nostre urbe.
teach.roman: iste pan es facite in nostre urbe
teach.english: This bread is made in our city.
teach.ipa: ˈiste pˈan es fatsˈite ˈin nˌostre ˈurbe
